title: Prism V3 Meal and Nutrition Records
description: Schema for daily meal and nutrition tracking records in the Prism V3 experiment. Each entry represents one day of food intake, hydration, and caloric data.

date.description: Calendar date for this daily meal record (ISO 8601).

meals.description: Individual meals and snacks consumed during the day.

meal_type.description: Type of meal or eating occasion.

foods.description: List of food items consumed in this meal.

estimated_calories.description: Estimated total calories for this meal.

daily_calories.description: Total estimated calories consumed across all meals for the day.

water_ml.description: Total water intake for the day in milliliters.
